_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to analyze potential adversarial attack vectors on a mission-critical system.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing adversarial testing for AI systems, including red-teaming LLMs, testing model robustness to input perturbation, and documenting vulnerability findings.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.628), SP-T-009 (SP, cosine: 0.599).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.625). Shared vocabulary: [adversarial]. DCWF-only terms [ability, analyze, attack, critical, mission, potential] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, designing, documenting, executing, findings, input] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.895, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Ability to analyze potential adversarial attack vectors on a mission-critical sy" and "Skill in designing and executing adversarial testing for AI systems, including r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.644 ≈ STS 0.625 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [adversarial] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.2%. Shared tokens: [adversarial]. DCWF-only: [ability, analyze, attack, critical, mission, potential]. WIDAI-only: [ai, designing, documenting, executing, findings, input].
